reviews.review_description: IVe played the game about 30 minutes and couldn't work the game really well. Everythings seems random when I ask question and even if my English is not perfect the answer doesn't seem appropriate to the question then nothing happen. No clue how the game really work, the concept is nice but need to be polish. Tried to ask for refund and said it's not eligible. Just bought it today and play 30 minutes so it's frustrating... The game need some explanations and warning on the language. I wouldn't recommend it... Sadly

I am getting responses to questions only for me the planchette moves too quickly for me to work out the response. Makes it harder but maybe add other equipment to make it an even better experience. (Emf,  spirit box etc.)

Hello I am writing to you because I have a doubt, the questions should be asked in English? , please I am from Spain and it would be good to be able to ask questions in Spanish and answers to the table in Spanish, I really like the environment, but I can't do much because of the language, I don't know if there is anything more about the mansion, than the corridors that go to the ground floor where the table is,  I can't do anything... I think language is fundamental. , please if you continue working on this project, include languages including Spanish so that we can all enjoy the experience, a hug, Thanks

reviews.review_title: Creepy game but confused what to do
reviews.review_description: I enjoy the creepiness of the game.. I ask questions and find out the girl was drowned by her mother and other stuff but it doesn’t seem to go anywhere after that. Do you unlock anything? Can you get past the table on the bottom floor? Can you beat this game? It’s very confusing and nothing is made clear. Thinking about returning if that’s all there is..
So its a very interesting concept, spooky and creepy at times the only thing I personally see is that when the board answers it spells out some the words and phrases too quickly for me any how

Great idea, but not sure what to do or how to work the board.. any update would help.

Cheers 👋
So, are there any actual spirits in the game? Or are we jus hoping that we get in contact with real legitimate spirits form the actual spirit realm???
But can't seem to get the ouija board working for some reason. I asked questions but no response or events took place!

developer_response.body:
Hi Aaron, thanks for your feedback. Please try uninstalling and reinstalling the game, and make sure to accept the microphone permissions when prompted. As for the spirits, place your finger gently on the planchette and be patient. They are elusive and may not appear right away—only when the connection is strong will they choose to manifest. 

If you continue to experience issues, feel free to reach out to us at raetaestudios@gmail.com and we’ll gladly assist you.
